# Solving linear equations for time

## Short Teaching Summary
Solving linear equations for time: Solving the meeting equation 18t = 12(t+14) results in t = 12, meaning they meet after Diego rides for one half hour and Lin rides for three quarters of an hour. Map connection: this idea links by requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
